vocab.meaning: khả năng cảm thụ thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Spending time in art galleries has definitely refined my aesthetic sensibilities over the years.

vocab.meaning: chất liệu/phương thức biểu đạt không truyền thống
vocab.example: I once saw an installation that used recycled plastic as an unconventional medium to highlight environmental issues.

vocab.meaning: những nét bút gợi cảm xúc
vocab.example: The evocative brushwork in the landscape paintings captured the turbulent mood of the sea perfectly.
While some find galleries boring, I find the historical context behind each piece to be intellectually stimulating.

vocab.meaning: chủ nghĩa tối giản thuần túy/khô khốc
vocab.example: The exhibition was characterized by stark minimalism, using only white space and simple lines.

vocab.meaning: sự sắp đặt cạnh nhau tạo ra sự tương phản thị giác
vocab.example: The gallery created a fascinating visual juxtaposition by placing ancient relics next to pop art.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua mọi giới hạn thời gian
vocab.example: There is a profound sense of wonder when you stand before a portrait that seems to transcend time.

vocab.meaning: chiều sâu về ý tưởng/khái niệm
vocab.example: I was particularly drawn to the conceptual depth of the modern sculptures on the second floor.
The temporary light installation was designed to showcase the ephemeral beauty of shadows.

vocab.meaning: sự sáng tạo không giới hạn/không bị kiềm tỏa
vocab.example: Public art galleries serve as a testament to the unfettered creativity of the human spirit.
